questions.question: Write a C program to declare and initialize a pointer that points to an integer variable. Explain the purpose of the ampersand (&) symbol in this context.
questions.hint: Remember the syntax for declaring a pointer variable

questions.question: A pointer to a character can be assigned the address of a string literal. Explain why this is allowed and provide an example code snippet.
questions.hint: Understand the behavior of string literals in C

questions.question: A program uses a pointer to store the base address of an array. Write a C program to print the elements of the array using the stored base address.
questions.hint: Use the pointer to access the array elements
